nodes.title: _handle_message()
nodes.sub: Главный оркестратор: identity→conv→RAG→LLM→handoff→funnel→CRM commit
nodes.code:
async def _handle_message(req: MessageRequest, db: Session) -> MessageResponse:
    """Pipeline:
      1. Identity: (channel, external_id, email?) -> Customer (existing or new)
      2. Conversation: get_or_create_conversation per channel thread
      3. Persist the user message
      4. RAG retrieval via pgvector
      5. Build LLM prompt with DB-stored history (last 12 messages)
      6. LLM call
      7. Persist assistant message
      8. Handoff check + (if real contact) fire brief + mark conversation HANDED_OFF
      9. Commit transaction once at the end
    """
    customer, was_returning_match = resolve_or_create_customer_with_meta(
        db,
        channel=req.channel,
        external_id=req.external_id,
        email=req.email,
        username=req.username,
    )

    conv_thread_id = req.channel_conversation_id or req.external_id
    conversation = get_or_create_conversation(
        db,
        customer_id=customer.id,
        channel=req.channel,
        channel_conversation_id=conv_thread_id,
    )
    # ... forum-topic lazy-create, RAG retrieval, LLM call,
    # anti-repeat + channel-guard reply guards, handoff detection,
    # funnel auto-transition, CRM dispatch — see main.py lines 691-1583
    return MessageResponse(
        answer=answer,
        handoff=handoff_triggered,
        customer_id=str(customer.id),
        conversation_id=str(conversation.id),
    )

nodes.title: telegram_webhook() — fast-200
nodes.sub: HMAC auth fail-closed + dedup + BackgroundThread offload

nodes.title: verify_meta_signature()
nodes.sub: HMAC-SHA256 X-Hub-Signature-256, fail-closed без App Secret
nodes.code:
def verify_meta_signature(
    app_secret: Optional[str],
    signature_header: Optional[str],
    body: bytes,
) -> bool:
    """Verify Meta webhook signature (X-Hub-Signature-256).
    Fails CLOSED: returns True ONLY if a secret is configured AND the
    signature matches."""
    if not app_secret:
        log.error("META_APP_SECRET not set — rejecting Meta webhook (fail-closed)")
        return False

    if not signature_header or not signature_header.startswith("sha256="):
        log.warning(f"meta signature: missing or malformed header — got {signature_header!r}")
        return False

    expected = "sha256=" + hmac.new(
        app_secret.encode("utf-8"),
        msg=body,
        digestmod=hashlib.sha256,
    ).hexdigest()

    if not hmac.compare_digest(expected, signature_header):
        log.warning("meta signature mismatch")
        return False

    return True

nodes.title: update_email() — customer merge
nodes.sub: Release email→UPDATE identities→assign→delete orphan (обходит ORM cascade)
nodes.code:
def update_email(db: Session, customer_id: UUID, email: str) -> Customer:
    """Set email on a customer. If email already belongs to another customer,
    MERGE both customers: re-point the other's identities to this one, then
    delete the orphan customer row."""
    target = db.get(Customer, customer_id)
    if target is None:
        raise ValueError(f"Customer {customer_id} not found")
    if target.email == email:
        return target

    other = db.execute(select(Customer).where(Customer.email == email)).scalar_one_or_none()
    if other is None:
        target.email = email
        db.flush()
        return target
    if other.id == target.id:
        return target

    # (1) re-point identities via raw UPDATE — avoids ORM cascade landmines
    db.execute(
        update(ChannelIdentity)
        .where(ChannelIdentity.customer_id == other.id)
        .values(customer_id=target.id)
    )
    db.expire(other, ["identities"])
    # (2) release email from `other`, (3) assign to `target`
    other.email = None
    db.flush()
    target.email = email
    db.flush()
    # (4) delete now-orphaned customer
    db.delete(other)
    db.flush()
    db.expire(target, ["identities"])
    return target

nodes.title: compute_initial_score()
nodes.sub: (base_by_type + content_keywords) × source_weight = итоговый score
nodes.code:
def compute_initial_score(
    *,
    interaction_type: str,
    channel: str,
    first_message_text: Optional[str],
    config_scoring: dict,
) -> ScoreComponents:
    """Score for a brand-new lead — base from interaction_type, content from first message."""
    base_map = config_scoring.get("base_by_interaction_type", {})
    keyword_map = config_scoring.get("content_keywords", {})
    source_weights = config_scoring.get("source_weight", {})

    base = base_score(interaction_type, base_map)
    content, matched = content_score(first_message_text, keyword_map)
    factor = source_factor(channel, source_weights)
    total = int((base + content) * factor)
    return ScoreComponents(
        base=base,
        content=content,
        source_factor_x10=int(factor * 10),
        total=total,
        matched_keywords=matched,
    )

nodes.title: decide_from_tenant_config()
nodes.sub: Engagement upgrade всегда побеждает decay в тот же turn
nodes.code:
def decide_from_tenant_config(
    *,
    current_temperature: str,
    content_replies_so_far: int,
    message_text: Optional[str],
    silent_days: float,
    tenant_config: dict,
) -> str:
    """Composite: apply engagement upgrade first, then decay.
    Engagement always wins over decay."""
    temp_cfg = (tenant_config or {}).get("temperature", {}) or {}

    upgraded = detect_from_message(
        current_temperature=current_temperature,
        content_replies_so_far=content_replies_so_far,
        message_text=message_text,
        config_temperature=temp_cfg,
    )
    if upgraded != current_temperature:
        return upgraded

    decay_days = int(temp_cfg.get("decay_days", 14))
    frozen_after = int(temp_cfg.get("frozen_after_days", 21))
    return apply_decay(
        current_temperature=current_temperature,
        silent_days=silent_days,
        decay_days=decay_days,
        frozen_after_days=frozen_after,
    )

nodes.title: dispatch_on_message_turn()
nodes.sub: Branching: upsert_contact→lazy deal→log×2→stage_change→followup task
nodes.code:
def dispatch_on_message_turn(
    *, customer, conversation, last_lead_message, last_bot_reply,
    handoff_just_fired, channel, lead_messages_count=0,
    project_type=None, handoff_data=None,
) -> None:
    """Process one message turn — enqueue CRM events implied.
    LAZY DEAL CREATION: deal only fires on real signal (handoff / score>=80
    / 3+ messages), not on every 'hi'."""
    try:
        if _is_test_email(getattr(customer, "email", None)):
            return
        customer_id = str(customer.id)
        contact_id = customer.crm_contact_id
        deal_id = conversation.crm_deal_id
        score = int(getattr(customer, "lead_score", 0) or 0)

        if not contact_id:
            _enqueue_upsert_contact(customer=customer, channel=channel)

        should_create_deal = (not deal_id) and (
            handoff_just_fired
            or score >= DEAL_CREATION_SCORE_THRESHOLD
            or lead_messages_count >= DEAL_CREATION_LEAD_MESSAGES_THRESHOLD
        )
        if should_create_deal:
            _enqueue_create_deal(customer=customer, conversation=conversation,
                                  first_message_text=last_lead_message,
                                  channel=channel, project_type=project_type)

        if last_lead_message:
            dispatch_message_log(customer_id=customer_id, crm_contact_id=contact_id,
                                  conversation_id=str(conversation.id), role="lead",
                                  channel=channel, text=last_lead_message)
        # ... bot reply log, handoff stage_change + operator task,
        # followup parse + self-schedule — see crm_dispatch.py lines 389-593
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.warning("[crm_dispatch] dispatch_on_message_turn failed: %s", exc)

nodes.title: _dispatch() — event→adapter translation
nodes.sub: Lazy pending-id resolve через to_thread, чтобы не блокировать event loop
nodes.code:
async def _dispatch(ev: CRMEvent, adapter: CRMAdapter) -> None:
    """Translate event type -> adapter call. Every sync DB op pushed to
    a thread via asyncio.to_thread so the event loop stays free
    (2026-05-29 incident: inline sync DB froze the whole loop under load)."""
    p = ev.payload
    if ev.type == "upsert_contact":
        contact_id = await adapter.upsert_contact(p["lead"])
        cb = p.get("on_contact_id")
        if cb is not None:
            await asyncio.to_thread(cb, contact_id)
        return

    if ev.type == "create_deal":
        contact_id = p["contact_id"]
        if contact_id == "pending":
            contact_id = await asyncio.to_thread(_resolve_pending_contact_id, ev.customer_id)
        deal_id = await adapter.create_deal(p["deal"], contact_id)
        cb = p.get("on_deal_id")
        if cb is not None:
            await asyncio.to_thread(cb, deal_id)
        return
    # ... update_deal_stage, update_lead_temperature, log_message,
    # create_task, schedule_followup — see crm_queue.py lines 254-317

nodes.title: _resolve_pending_contact_id()
nodes.sub: DB-lookup CRM contact_id, raise если writeback ещё не применился (retry)
nodes.code:
def _resolve_pending_contact_id(customer_id: str) -> str:
    """Look up the real CRM contact_id from DB.
    Used by events enqueued with contact_id='pending' — the writeback
    from an earlier upsert_contact event should have populated
    Customer.crm_contact_id by the time the worker gets here. If not,
    raise so retry backoff kicks in."""
    from db.connection import session_scope
    from db.models import Customer
    from uuid import UUID

    with session_scope() as s:
        cust = s.query(Customer).filter(Customer.id == UUID(customer_id)).first()
        if cust and cust.crm_contact_id:
            return cust.crm_contact_id
    raise RuntimeError(
        f"contact_id still pending for customer {customer_id} — "
        f"writeback from upsert_contact not yet applied"
    )

nodes.title: class Customer(Base)
nodes.sub: email-anchor UNIQUE, UTM×4, CRM-ids, Notion §4/5/7 оси на одной строке
nodes.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = "customers"

    id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)
    email: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(320), unique=True, nullable=True, index=True)
    name: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)
    phone: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(50), nullable=True, index=True)
    first_channel: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(SQLEnum(ChannelEnum, native_enum=False), nullable=True)

    utm_source: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)
    utm_campaign: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)
    utm_medium: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True)
    utm_content: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)

    profile_data: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSONB, nullable=True)

    crm_contact_id: Mapped[Optional[str]] = mapped_column(String(100), nullable=True, index=True)
    lead_score: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, nullable=False, server_default="0")
    lead_temperature: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=False, server_default="cold", index=True)
    interaction_type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(10), nullable=False, server_default="P2")
    identity_keys: Mapped[Optional[dict]] = mapped_column(JSONB, nullable=True)

    identities: Mapped[list["ChannelIdentity"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="customer", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
    )
    conversations: Mapped[list["Conversation"]] = relationship(
        back_populates="customer", cascade="all, delete-orphan"
    )

nodes.title: similarity_search()
nodes.sub: bge-m3 embed_query → pgvector cosine_distance ORDER BY LIMIT k (HNSW index)
nodes.code:
def similarity_search(query: str, k: int = 4) -> list[Document]:
    """Top-k nearest kb_chunks to `query` via pgvector cosine distance."""
    embedder = _get_embedder()
    query_vec = embedder.embed_query(query)

    with session_scope() as db:
        rows = db.execute(
            select(
                KBChunk,
                KBChunk.embedding.cosine_distance(query_vec).label("distance"),
            )
            .order_by(KBChunk.embedding.cosine_distance(query_vec))
            .limit(k)
        ).all()

        docs = [
            Document(
                page_content=row.KBChunk.content,
                metadata={
                    "source": row.KBChunk.source,
                    "chunk_index": row.KBChunk.chunk_index,
                    "distance": float(row.distance),
                },
            )
            for row in rows
        ]
        return docs

nodes.title: should_trigger_recall()
nodes.sub: SQL join+subquery: prior conv 14д+ назад с 3+ user-сообщениями
nodes.code:
def should_trigger_recall(db: Session, customer_id: UUID) -> bool:
    """Return True iff this customer has at least one prior Conversation
    where last_message_at is at least RECALL_MIN_GAP_DAYS days in the past
    AND that Conversation has at least RECALL_MIN_LEAD_MESSAGES messages
    with role='user'."""
    threshold = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=RECALL_MIN_GAP_DAYS)

    user_msg_count = (
        select(Message.conversation_id, func.count().label("n"))
        .where(Message.role == "user")
        .group_by(Message.conversation_id)
        .subquery()
    )

    stmt = (
        select(Conversation.id)
        .join(user_msg_count, user_msg_count.c.conversation_id == Conversation.id)
        .where(
            Conversation.customer_id == customer_id,
            Conversation.last_message_at <= threshold,
            user_msg_count.c.n >= RECALL_MIN_LEAD_MESSAGES,
        )
        .limit(1)
    )
    row = db.execute(stmt).first()
    return row is not None

nodes.sub: Regex-парсер «через N мин/час/дней», TZ UTC+7 для дневной гранулярности

nodes.title: class NoOpAdapter(CRMAdapter)
nodes.sub: Синтетические noop:<kind>:<uuid> id + info-лог на каждый метод контракта
nodes.code:
class NoOpAdapter(CRMAdapter):
    provider_name = "noop"

    async def upsert_contact(self, lead: Lead) -> str:
        contact_id = _fake_id("contact")
        logger.info(
            "[noop crm] upsert_contact lead_id=%s channel=%s name=%s -> %s",
            lead.id, lead.channel, lead.contact_name, contact_id,
        )
        return contact_id

    async def create_deal(self, deal: Deal, contact_id: str) -> str:
        deal_id = _fake_id("deal")
        logger.info(
            "[noop crm] create_deal conv=%s contact=%s stage=%s title=%r -> %s",
            deal.conversation_id, contact_id, deal.stage, deal.title, deal_id,
        )
        return deal_id

    async def health_check(self) -> bool:
        return True

nodes.title: load_tenant() + Tenant.get()
nodes.sub: YAML→dataclass, fail loudly при отсутствии config.yaml/system_prompt.md
nodes.code:
def load_tenant(slug: str, project_root: Optional[Path] = None) -> Tenant:
    """Load a tenant from tenants/<slug>/.
    Raises FileNotFoundError if the directory, config.yaml, or referenced
    system_prompt.md is missing — startup fails loudly rather than run
    with a half-loaded tenant."""
    root = project_root or _PROJECT_ROOT
    tenant_dir = root / "tenants" / slug
    config_path = tenant_dir / "config.yaml"
    if not config_path.exists():
        raise FileNotFoundError(f"Tenant config not found: {config_path}")

    raw_config = yaml.safe_load(config_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    prompt_path = root / raw_config["brand"]["system_prompt_path"]
    system_prompt = prompt_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")

    return Tenant(
        slug=raw_config["tenant_slug"],
        display_name=raw_config["display_name"],
        languages=raw_config["languages"],
        system_prompt=system_prompt,
        raw_config=raw_config,
    )
